data.name: ACESurvivor
data.detailed_description:
Many years after the outbreak, survivors face another crisis caused by the evolution of infected persons. In order to return to the cities and clear the increasingly dangerous infected persons, the new government decides to adopt survival selection to select outstanding warriors and form combat troops with these warriors as the center. Any survivors aged 18 or over can participate in the selection.

You will be able to choose to control 5 different characters and complete a 30-day survival exam in a small city. The base behind you can only provide limited support. You need to constantly strengthen yourself, make reasonable choices of treasures to complete the test.

In this game, you will experience exciting sword slashes, satisfying gunshots, the joy of headshots, intense battlefield support, and interesting directional key rhythm attacks. Let's do it together.

Game features:

◆Battlefield Support◆
Call for battlefield support and trigger them at the right time to solve the problems you encounter and make combat more exciting (will continue to increase with game updates).

◆Joyful Fitness◆
Quickly press the direction keys correctly and hit perfectly to improve your various important attributes.

◆ Clothing Battle Damage ◆

Five characters in the game have detailed clothing battle damage designs. Each character's clothing has up to 10 stages of battle damage effects, bringing you a unique experience on your challenge journey. Please note that if you focus too much on the tattered clothes, it could lead to a tragedy.

◆Sniping to Earn◆
Earn enough points by challenging long-range sniping targets to make the battlefield richer and more chaotic.

◆Accessory Customization◆
Customize your equipment with reasonable combinations to better cope with enemies and special situations you encounter on that day.

This is a personally developed game. I can't compare it to many large-scale games, but I hope everyone can feel the novelty and joy in my game. I am very open to player feedback to make the game more enjoyable.

data.short_description: This is a refreshing survival game of shooting and slashing that uniquely combines long-distance sniping, directional rhythm fitness, equipment matching, and battlefield support gameplay. It is perfect for players who enjoy exciting battles, violent killing, and satisfying decompression.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 日文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows10
  • 處理器: I5-10600/AMD 5600x
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX1070/AMD RX5600
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows10+
  • 處理器: I5-12600k/AMD 5800x
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 3060Ti/AMD 6700XT
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows10
  • Processor: I5-10600/AMD 5600x
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GTX1070/AMD RX5600
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows10+
  • Processor: I5-12600k/AMD 5800x
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 3060Ti/AMD 6700XT
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 15 GB available space
